MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $30.00 FILED BY SHEK, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, ALLAN LAM, CONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEK, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, ALLAN LAM, CONNIE $30.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
